title: 3S Software (Secured Smart Systems Overview Metrics) ransomware incident

extortion.description: 3S Group is a world-class provider of diverse technology services, specializing in software development, applications integration, data management, and analytics. They offer scalable and reliable solutions utilizing Microsoft technologies in areas such as e-business and enterprise applications. The company also designs, integrates, installs, and maintains integrated security systems, catering to a wide range of clients. With over 200 experts and 500 projects completed in 17 years, they focus on understanding client needs to provide tailored technology solutions
